package common

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for shared_package_named_common_base_utils_with_mixed_exports: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Generic packages that mix services, models, DTOs, validators, and queries behind one broad shared namespace.
type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsModel
}

type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsService struct {
    repo *CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

// package common is an example of a grab-bag shared package mixing unrelated exports.
// This file simulates what would be in: internal/common/common.go
// It exports models, DTOs, a service, a validator, and utility functions together.

type CommonOrderModel struct {
    ID     string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    Amount int    `gorm:"column:amount" json:"amount"`
}

type CommonCreateUserDTO struct {
    Name  string `json:"name" binding:"required"`
    Email string `json:"email" binding:"required"`
}

type CommonNotificationService struct {
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
}

func (s *CommonNotificationService) Send(to, subject, body string) error {
    fmt.Printf("sending to %s: %s\n", to, subject)
    return nil
}

func CommonValidateEmail(email string) bool {
    return strings.Contains(email, "@")
}

func CommonFormatCurrency(amount int) string {
    return fmt.Sprintf("$%d.00", amount)
}

func CommonToSnakeCase(s string) string {
    return strings.ToLower(s)
}

func PositiveSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExports(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsDTO) error {
    _ = CommonValidateEmail(input)
    _ = CommonFormatCurrency(100)
    svc := &CommonNotificationService{client: client, logger: log.Default()}
    svc.Send(input, "test", "body")
    db.Create(&CommonOrderModel{ID: input, Status: "new", Amount: 50})
    return nil
}
